'''Tourou''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ferroan]] who lived on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He kidnapped [[Danni Quee]] under Sekot's influence. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] later persuaded Tourou to take him and [[Saba Sebatyne]] to his leader as well.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1st}}
